title: Smooth Hover
description: Adds hover animation for some GUI elements like buttons and inventory.
body:
![Mod name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7e5ce3f4b9cc81b44c5d8621efb059acb8c0103.png)

Have you ever wondered why Minecraft doesn't have **smooth animations** for buttons and other ui elements? Well, this mod is for you! **Enhance your gameplay experience with smooth animations for some UI components!**

## There are several features right now
### Smooth hover animation for all buttons!

![Button animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a9880a310f641cc6fef8469c963151ec5eb02f2.gif)

Resource pack used above is [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) but mod doesn't need one, as well as additional support from other mod/resource pack devs.
 
### Smooth fade-in-out for inventory slots!
* Option to toggle slots display mode
* Option to change transition speed
* Option to change color
* Option to change opacity   

![Smooth transition between slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bf80619ac1bf881cf250804e7c15767a33ce7c6.gif)

## Recommended mods
I also highly encourage you to try these mods, if you liked mine:
* [Immersive UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ui)
* [Smooth GUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui)
* [Smooth Scrolling](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scrolling-refurbished)
* [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping)

## Compatibility
This mod should work with every other mod out there!

## Usage in modpacks
Feel free to use this mod in any Modrinth and Curseforge modpack, but you cannot use it in any modpack that is hidden behind a paywall, e.g. Patreon without my permission.

**Я запрещаю вам использовать данный мод в своих сборках**, доступ к которым предоставляется через **Patreon, Boosty** или иные средства, предусматривающие получение, для загрузки мода и/или сборки, включающей данный мод, вознаграждения/оплаты **без моего прямого разрешения**.
